meaning: adj.全是泡沫的,泡沫的,起泡沫的
examples: Whisk the egg whites until they are foamy but not stiff.
Primate foamy viruses can infect humans harmlessly, but researchers fear they may evolve to become dangerous.
Before landing on the beach, the oil had become "weathered," made foamy and gooey by extended exposure to air and water.
The trick: folding in a small tsunami of beaten egg whites to give the batter foamy body.
The current swirled in foamy eddies, and waterfalls cascaded from fjordsides.
